rules: Once per turn, at any time during allied character's Activation, it may spend 2 POWER to use this Leadership Ability. Additionally, each Healthy non-Grunt allied character Contesting an objetive token counts as 2 Healthy characters when determining who is Securing the objective token.

rules: Push an enemy character within RANGE 4 toward this character MEDIUM. A character can be pushed by this superpower only once per turn.

superpowers.name: So Many Snacks
rules: After an attack agains this character is resolved, it may use this superpower. If the attack is within RANGE 3, this character may make an attack against the attacker. This superpower can be used only once per turn.

superpowers.name: Symbiotic Instincts
rules: When this character is attacking, the defending character cannot modify their defense dice.

attacks.name: Triage
special_rules: After this attack is resolved, this character gains 1 POWER.
If this attack would deal more than 1 WOUND, it dealts 1 WOUND instead.

HIT Medic: After this attack is resolved, choose up to 1 other allied character within RANGE 3. Remove 1 special condition from the chosen character or remove 1 WOUND for each HIT in the attack roll from the chosen character.

attacks.name: Sonic Barrage
special_rules: WILD Stun: After each attack is resolved, the defender gains the Stun special condition.

superpowers.name: Life Support Systems
rules: This character immediately makes a Shake action.

superpowers.name: Medevac
rules: Action: This character immediately Advances LARGE. Then this character may choose another allied character within RANGE 2 that has an Activated token. If it does, Place the chosen character within RANGE 1 of this character. Then this character may remove up to 2 WOUND or 1 special condition from the chosen character. This superpower can be used only once per Turn.

superpowers.name: Sonic Force Fields
rules: When this character or another allied character within RANGE 3 is targeted by PHYSICAL or ENERGY attack or would make a dodge roll, this character may use this superpower. This character adds 2 dice to the defense or dodge roll.

superpowers.name: Rescue Armor
rules: When this character would suffer WOUND from an enemy effect, reduce the amount of WOUND suffered by 1, to a minimum of 1.
Addicionally, when this character removes 1 or more WOUND or special condition from another allied character, after the effect is resolved, this character gains 1 POWER.

Addicionally, when this character removes 1 or more WOUND or special condition from another allied character, after the effect is resolved, this character gains 1 POWER.

leadership.name: Legion of Monsters
rules: Once per Turn, when an allied character gargets a character with an attack, it may pay 1 POWER. If it does, the attack gains your choice of 1 the following effects:
Boom!: Before WOUND is dealt, each other character within RANGE 2 of the target character suffers 1 WOUND.
Horrify: After this attack is resolved, the target character gaisn the Root special condition.
Silver Bullet: WOUND caused by this attack cannot be reduced or prevented by superpowers or Team Tactic Cards.

attacks.name: Monster Hunting Weapons
special_rules: After this attack is resolved, this character gains POWER equal to the WOUND dealt.
CRIT Cursing Shot: After this attack is resolved, the target character gains the Slow special condition.
WILD Hellfire: After this attack is resolved, the target character gains the Incenerate special condition.

attacks.name: Bloodgem Blast
special_rules: During the Pay POWER step of this attack, this character may spend up to three adicional POWER. Add 1 die to this attack for each POWER spend in this way.
WILD Degeneration: After this attack is resolved, the defender cannot have WOUND removed from it until the end of the Activation Phase this Round.

superpowers.name: Run and Gun
rules: Action: This character immediately makes an attack action followed by a move action.

superpowers.name: Supernatural Senses
rules: While this character is defending againts PHYSICAL or ENERY attack, during the Modify Dice step of the attack, it may use this superpower. This character may reroll any number of its defense dice, including FAIL results.

superpowers.name: Bearer of the Bloodgem
rules: When an enemy character causes this character to gain one or more special conditions, after the effect is resolved, the enemy character suffers 1 WOUND. Additionally, this character cannot be Advanced or Place by the effects of ENERGY attacks or enemy superpowers.
